Meet the next filmmaker in Beyond the Loop @jidenna 

Grammy-nominated musician, writer and actor, best known for his double platinum hit “Classic Man” and albums The Chief and 85 to Africa. Born to a Nigerian father and raised between continents, he’s always told stories that bridge cultures and defy genre.

Now he’s channelling that same creativity into AI filmmaking. And his take on it is worth paying attention to: Jidenna sees AI as the modern evolution of Hip-Hop sampling. Not a trend. A through-line. The same creative DNA that built a culture out of borrowed sounds, now building worlds out of generated frames.

His AI film catalogue, what he calls “random acts of flyness,” includes False Idols (2025), Jungle Fever (2024), and the micro-series Oga City.

Join the Wonder App to get closer to the films, the process, and the creators shaping what comes next. 

Link in bio.

We have a winner✨

We selected one Wonder Marketplace creator for a 4-month creative residency to create a breakout pilot - and the applications blew us away. 

Thank you to every single person who entered. The creativity in this community is something else. But one idea shone through, and we are so thrilled to announce our Wonder Marketplace winner: @junielaux 🏆

Junie is a London/Shanghai-based director building a post-digital cinematic language at the intersection of AI and storytelling. From Tribeca to the Royal Academy of Arts, her award-winning work has captivated global audiences. With collaborations spanning Google, OpenAI, and ByteDance, Junie brings a truly world-class perspective to the series - and now she's bringing her winning idea to life.
